scripts.build:all: bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-arm64 --outfile dist/cli/arcturus-darwin-arm64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-darwin-x64 --outfile dist/cli/arcturus-darwin-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-x64 --outfile dist/cli/arcturus-linux-x64 && bun build src/index.ts --compile --target=bun-linux-arm64 --outfile dist/cli/arcturus-linux-arm64
